finding: Adaptive request mode routed natural language into a strict production packet.
action: Review request-routing accuracy after the concept phase and add intake signals when the route felt slow or surprising.

finding: Built-in generation returned visually promising Otis sources below the native 4K source contract and with non-flat chroma-key backgrounds.
action: Added art:preflight and changed production character runs to prefer individual native sprite sources instead of low-resolution multi-pose sheets.

finding: Three controlled Otis probes all failed source preflight; removing chroma-key did not solve the native source-resolution limit.
action: Stop bulk Otis generation on the current built-in path. Decide on a higher-resolution source strategy or explicitly revise the production source contract before generating the 21-sprite pack.
